mapper.select: SELECT result_id , user_id , result_type_cd , title , content , use_yn , reg_dt , upd_dt FROM tbl_insight_result WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY result_type_cd
SELECT result_id , user_id , result_type_cd , title , content , use_yn , reg_dt , upd_dt FROM tbl_insight_result WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND result_type_cd = #{resultTypeCd} AND use_yn = 'Y'
